RichText.Text: 1. hesitate to do... v. without hesitation n. be hesitant about/to do ... adj. 2. feel anxious about... be filled with anxiety 3. make contributions to... contribute to 4. take up the challenge 5. teach me the basic techniques 6. apply glue carefully to the torn book 7. acquire a new skill 8. form a deeper bond/connection with sb. 9. require particular skills one particularly humourous letter in particular be particular about food 10. make a difference to...

TextRun.Text: 6. 小心地给破损的书涂上胶水

RichText.Text: 1. 犹豫做某事 毫不犹豫 对做某事感到犹豫 2. 对……感到焦虑 充满焦虑 3. 为……做贡献 有助于；促成；捐献 4. 接受挑战 5. 教我基本技巧 6. 小心地给破损的书涂上胶水 7. 获得/掌握一项新技能 8. 与某人形成更深的纽带/联系 9. 需要特定的/特别的技能 一封特别幽默的信 尤其；特别地 对食物挑剔 10. 对……有影响；使……有所不同
